relations.note: Main callout is one of the three exclusive styles.
Secondary/data callout is one of the three exclusive styles.
Text-heavy callout is one of the three exclusive styles.

effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section (no two of the same style competing)
effect.subject: callout_style

quotes: use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent competing/duplicated callout styles crowding a single screen.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles (main, secondary/data, text-heavy). Use them judiciously; never allow two of the same style competing on one screen/section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.

**Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Standardize the main key-point callout treatment.
rules.rule_text: Main callout (key point): Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below, centered. Rule weight 2px (callout.main.rule_weight), rule width ≈ 60–100% of the text block, with 16px padding between rule and text (spacing.gap.heading_body_16).

quotes: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

**Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.rule_text: Secondary/data callout: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint (opacity.callout.light_blue_70 = 0.7) with Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). 20px internal padding (padding.callout.secondary_20); corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

quotes: **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.

**Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Standardize the text-heavy list/description callout treatment and its mobile collapse.
rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_30 = 0.3), Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text. 24px internal padding (padding.section.side_24); the two-column icon+text layout collapses to a single column on mobile.
